title: DMProfile
description: An inferred behavioral profile of the AI DM, built from observed patterns.

last_updated_turn.description: Most recent turn this profile reflects.

structure_patterns.description: Observed patterns in how the DM structures responses.

hint_patterns.description: Observed patterns in how the DM delivers hints or clues.

formatting_preferences.description: Observed formatting choices (e.g. 'uses bullet points for NPC dialogue', 'describes scenes in second person').

notes.description: Freeform notes and observations about the DM style.

confidence.description: Overall confidence in this profile based on observed turns (0.0–1.0).
